content: Scaffold project: FastAPI backend + React/Vite frontend, install dependencies
Build FastAPI backend: models, schemas, auth, projects, investments, ratings, admin, file upload routes
Build React app shell: routing, layout, global styles, design system tokens
Build Marketplace page: offering cards, filters, search, ratings display
Build Create Offering flow: multi-step form, file uploads, interest config
Build Offering Detail, Portfolio, Admin Dashboard pages
